description.en:
Sorts your husbandries alphabetically in the Animals menu for easier management and navigation.
Singleplayer only.
Features: - Automatically sorts husbandries by the names you have given them - No configuration required - just install and enjoy
Changelog: 1.0.1.0: - Improved internal code structure and logging for better diagnostics - Added automated test suite for reliability
1.0.0.0: - Initial release - Automatically sorts husbandries alphabetically by name in the Animals menu
Documentation: https://github.com/rittermod/FS25_AlphabeticalHusbandries
